krt.message.train_arrival: Passengers, the train is arriving. This train terminates at %s station. Please line up according to the ground indicators. When the train arrives, please let passengers exit first before boarding. Mind the gap.
krt.message.train_announcement: Passengers, this train terminates at %s station. The next station is %s station. Passengers boarding, please move inside. Please do not beg, perform, or distribute flyers in the carriage.
krt.message.train_station: Passengers, %s station has arrived. Please take all your belongings and exit the train in the %s direction of the train's forward movement. Be careful when opening the doors.
